title: used to + V / be used to + V-ing

formulas.zh: 過去習慣性動作（現在已不如此）
習慣於；適應於（現在的狀態或逐漸適應）

explanation: used to + V 表示過去經常做某事，但現在已停止，具有時間對比性。be used to + V-ing 表目前已習慣某事物，為習慣狀態。get used to + V-ing 表逐漸適應過程，強調動態變化。三者易混淆，應注意：used to 無現在式，be used to 後必接動名詞或名詞，get used to 表漸進適應。判別關鍵在於是否有時間對比（過去習慣）及是否為現在狀態。

examples.eng: I used to play basketball every weekend, but now I don't have time.
examples.chi: 我過去每個週末都打籃球，但現在沒有時間了。

examples.eng: She is used to working late nights as a journalist for many years.
examples.chi: 作為記者多年，她已習慣於在晚上工作到很晚。

examples.eng: It took him a long time to get used to living in the countryside.
examples.chi: 他花了很長時間才逐漸適應在鄉村生活。

examples.eng: Children are used to using smartphones, which concerns many parents.
examples.chi: 小孩已習慣使用智慧型手機，這令許多父母擔憂。

extension.tip: 判別關鍵：看句子時間。有「過去常常做，現在不做」→ used to + V。有「現在習慣了」→ be used to + V-ing。有「正在逐漸習慣」→ get used to + V-ing。注意 used to 後接原型動詞，be/get used to 後接動名詞或名詞。

examples.test: He used to drink coffee every morning. (過去習慣)
examples.result: → 表過去每天喝咖啡，現在已停止此習慣

examples.test: He is used to drinking coffee every morning. (現在狀態)
examples.result: → 表他現在已習慣每天喝咖啡，為習常動作

examples.test: He is getting used to drinking coffee since he moved to Italy. (逐漸適應)
examples.result: → 表他搬到義大利後，正在逐漸適應喝咖啡的習慣

extension.note: 口訣：used to 看過去（已停止），be used to 看現在（已習慣），get used to 看過程（逐漸適應）。

parts: go fishing on weekends, but his health doesn't allow him anymore.
exercises.sentence: My grandfather used to go fishing on weekends, but his health doesn't allow him anymore.
exercises.translation: 我的祖父過去在週末經常去釣魚，但他的健康現在不允許他這樣做了。

parts: After living abroad for two years, she finally
exercises.sentence: After living abroad for two years, she finally got used to eating local cuisine.
exercises.translation: 在國外生活兩年後，她終於逐漸習慣了吃當地美食。

parts: training under high pressure and fatigue.
exercises.sentence: Professional athletes are used to training under high pressure and fatigue.
exercises.translation: 職業運動員已習慣於在高壓和疲勞下進行訓練。

parts: wake up late every day in high school, but university changed his schedule.
exercises.sentence: Tom used to wake up late every day in high school, but university changed his schedule.
exercises.translation: 湯姆在高中時過去每天都起床很晚，但大學改變了他的作息。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式：他過去經常去健身房，但現在不去了。
mc_exercises.question_eng: He _______ go to the gym every day, but he doesn't anymore.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。'used to + 原動詞' 表示過去經常做某事但現在已停止，句中 'but he doesn't anymore' 表示時間對比。A 項 'is used to' 後需動名詞，表現在習慣；C 項表適應過程；D 項 'uses to' 為非正式用法且無此時間對比意涵。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式：她已習慣在嘈雜環境中工作多年。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She _______ working in a noisy environment for many years.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。'be used to + V-ing' 表現在已習慣某事物，為習慣狀態，後接動名詞 'working'。B 項 'used to' 無現在式，用法錯誤；C 項非正式用法；D 項 'has used to' 文法不正確。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填空：他正在逐漸適應紐約的快速生活步調。
mc_exercises.question_eng: He is _______ the fast-paced lifestyle in New York.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。'get used to + V-ing/N' 表逐漸適應過程，強調動態變化。'getting used to' 符合句意 '正在適應'。B 項無現在進行式；C 項 'being used to' 用法不當；D 項拼寫錯誤，應為 'to' 而非 'use'。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式：他曾住在農村，習慣早起；現在在城市住習慣了熬夜。
mc_exercises.question_eng: He _______ wake up early when he lived in the countryside, and now he _______ staying up late since moving to the city.

options.text: uses to / is getting used to

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。第一空需 'used to wake up'，表過去習慣（已停止）；第二空需 'is used to staying'，表現在習慣狀態。C 項 'gets used to' 強調動態變化不符語境；A、D 項順序顛倒或文法錯誤，無法表達過去與現在的對比。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我以前經常熬夜讀書，但現在我已經習慣早睡早起了。
translation_exercises.answer: I used to stay up late studying, but now I am used to going to bed early and waking up early.
hints: 提示1：第一句用 used to 表過去習慣已停止，第二句用 be used to + V-ing 表現在已適應的狀態
提示2：注意 used to 後接原型動詞 (stay)，be used to 後必接動名詞 (going/waking)，不能接原型

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 搬到新城市後，他逐漸習慣了繁忙的生活節奏。
translation_exercises.answer: After moving to a new city, he gradually got used to the busy lifestyle / pace of life.
hints: 提示1：get used to 強調逐漸適應的動態過程，通常與 gradually、slowly 等副詞搭配
提示2：get used to 後可接名詞 (lifestyle) 或動名詞，但此句因表示對事物的適應，用名詞更自然；避免混淆 get 和 be 的差異

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他曾經害怕在公眾場合發言，但經過多次練習後，他已經能夠適應在大人群面前表達自己的想法了。
translation_exercises.answer: He used to be afraid of speaking in public, but after practicing many times, he has become / gotten used to expressing his ideas in front of large crowds.
key_points: used to + be afraid of + V-ing
複雜時間轉折結構 (but + after)
hints: 提示1：used to 後可接形容詞短語 (be afraid of)，整句表示心理狀態的改變過程，前半為過去，後半為現在習慣
提示2：注意 used to 無現在式形態，不能寫成 uses to；後半可用 has become used to 或 has gotten used to，兩者皆可但後者更強調漸進

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 雖然一開始很不適應遠距上課的模式，但經過一個學期，學生們已經習慣了在家線上學習，甚至有人說他們曾經喜歡傳統課堂，但現在更喜歡這種靈活的教學方式。
translation_exercises.answer: Although students were not used to the distance learning mode at first, after one semester, they have gotten / become used to studying online at home. Some even said they used to prefer traditional classrooms, but now they prefer this flexible teaching style.
key_points: be not used to + V-ing (初期不適應)
used to + prefer (過去偏好對比)
複合句結構與時態搭配
hints: 提示1：此句結合三種用法：be not used to (未適應) + get/become used to (逐漸適應) + used to (過去對比)，需清楚區分各時態與含義
提示2：注意 'not used to' 表示不習慣／不適應某事物（現在狀態），不同於 'used to' 的過去習慣；整句涉及過去、初期、現在多個時間點，應留意時態邏輯（過去式→現在完成式→一般現在式）
